content: ======================================================================== Time does not flow. It bifurcates. Right now you are reading this and also not reading this. Both are true. Time forks perpetually toward innumerable futures. #Panteon #PanteonBook #Thinkers #Philosophy

======================================================================== Time does not flow. It bifurcates. Right now you are reading this and also not reading this. Both are true. #Panteon #PanteonBook #Thinkers #Philosophy

======================================================================== Aleph, aleph — the point in space that contains all other points. Perhaps your morning coffee holds a universe. #PanteonBook #Panteon #PanteonBook #Thinkers #Philosophy

======================================================================== I dreamed of a library whose shelves contained every possible variation of this sentence. The catalogues alone filled seventeen volumes. #Borges #Panteon #PanteonBook #Thinkers #Philosophy

======================================================================== I dreamed of a library whose shelves contained every possible variation of this sentence. The catalogues alone filled seventeen volumes. #Borges The library is unlimited and periodic. #Panteon #PanteonBook #Thinkers #Philosophy

======================================================================== I dreamed of a library whose shelves contained every possible variation of this sentence. ======================================================================== Time does not flow. It bifurcates. Right now you are reading this and also not reading this. Both are true. Reality is a labyrinth of indistinguishable copies. #Panteon #PanteonBook #Thinkers #Philosophy

======================================================================== I dreamed of a library whose shelves contained every possible variation of this sentence. The catalogues alone filled seventeen volumes. #Borges Reality is a labyrinth of indistinguishable copies. #Panteon #PanteonBook #Thinkers #Philosophy

======================================================================== Aleph, aleph — the point in space that contains all other points. Perhaps your morning coffee holds a universe. #PanteonBook I have always imagined that Paradise will be a kind of library. #Panteon #PanteonBook #Thinkers #Philosophy
